summary: Iteration 204: Verifica Coerenza Rintracciabilita + Template PDF Processo 111 - All backend tests passed (24/24). Frontend UI verified: Template 111 button in action bar, Verifica Coerenza button triggers analysis showing 3 critical issues (missing cert 3.1) + 3 attention issues (DDT not linked).

issues: Console warning: In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span> - hydration warning from React dev tools (cosmetic, not functional)

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/fpc/batches/verifica-coerenza/{commessa_id} returns discrepancy analysis with riepilogo (totale=3, conformi=0, critici=3, attenzione=0, senza_colata=0, senza_certificato=3, pct_conforme=0)
Verifica Coerenza correctly detects certificato_mancante (critica) and ddt_non_collegato (attenzione) issues for all 3 batches
GET /api/template-111/preview/{commessa_id} returns azienda data (Steel Project Design Srls, P.IVA 02042850897) and specifiche_tecniche (UNI EN ISO 15614-1, processo 111)
Template 111 auto-populates classe_esecuzione=EXC2 from Riesame Tecnico
GET /api/template-111/pdf/{commessa_id} generates valid PDF (29KB+) with Content-Disposition attachment header
Frontend TracciabilitaMaterialiSection shows 'Verifica Coerenza' button (data-testid='tracciabilita-verifica-btn') that triggers analysis
Frontend shows verify result panel (data-testid='tracciabilita-verify-result') with stats grid (Conformi, Critici, Senza colata, Senza cert.) and per-lotto issue details
Frontend CommessaHubPage has 'Template 111' button (data-testid='btn-template-111') in top action bar (amber/orange color)
Regression: /api/fpc/batches/rintracciabilita/{commessa_id} still returns 3 batches with colata values
Regression: /api/riesame/{commessa_id} auto-checks (strumenti_tarati, materiali_confermati, tolleranza_calibro) still work correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements working, data correctly displayed)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test commessa with 3 material_batches (bat_loiano_0/1/2) that have colata but no certificates or DDT links.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 204 verified two new P0 features: (1) Verifica Coerenza Rintracciabilita at /api/fpc/batches/verifica-coerenza/{commessa_id} - compares material_batches with DDT to detect discrepancies (certificato_mancante, ddt_non_collegato, colata_mancante, descrizione_mismatch, quantita_mismatch, colata_mismatch). Returns riepilogo with totale/conformi/critici/attenzione/senza_colata/senza_certificato/pct_conforme. (2) Template PDF Processo 111 at /api/template-111/preview/{commessa_id} and /api/template-111/pdf/{commessa_id} - generates professional PDF for welding qualification request per UNI EN ISO 15614-1, EXC2, S275/S355. Auto-populates company data from company_settings and classe_esecuzione from Riesame Tecnico. Frontend: TracciabilitaMaterialiSection has 'Verifica Coerenza' button that shows results panel with stats and issue details. CommessaHubPage has 'Template 111' button in top action bar.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/fpc/batches/verifica-coerenza/{: PASS - Returns discrepancy analysis with 3 critici (certificato_mancante) + 3 attenzione (ddt_non_collegato)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/template-111/preview/{commessa_: PASS - Returns azienda (Steel Project Design Srls, P.IVA 02042850897), specifiche_tecniche (UNI EN ISO 15614-1), classe_esecuzione=EXC2
backend_endpoints.GET /api/template-111/pdf/{commessa_id}: PASS - Returns valid PDF (29KB+) with correct Content-Type and Content-Disposition
backend_endpoints.GET /api/fpc/batches/rintracciabilita/{c: PASS (regression) - Returns 3 batches with colata values
backend_endpoints.GET /api/riesame/{commessa_id}: PASS (regression) - Auto-checks (strumenti_tarati, materiali_confermati, tolleranza_calibro) work correctly

VerifyResultPanel.stats_grid: PASS - Shows Conformi=0, Critici=3, Senza colata=0, Senza cert.=3
VerifyResultPanel.issue_details: PASS - Shows per-lotto issues with gravita (critica/attenzione) and messaggio

TracciabilitaTable.rows: PASS - 3 material batch rows with colata column
